fault_hypothesis: The function incorrectly converts floating-point allocations to integers by simple truncation on line 66. This discards fractional parts, causing the sum of final allocations to be less than the total inventory when shares are not whole numbers.

constraints.intent: The sum of integer allocations after conversion must equal the total integer inventory.
The sum of the computed float allocations should equal the total inventory before integer conversion.
The sum of truncated parts must equal the truncated sum of the original float values.
The number of allocations returned must match the number of recipients.
